TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_Shitan, title = Shitan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shitan} }

S.FORM: Shitan Shitan gu icuwa i Miaoli. ala atjunangn mapuljat 79.39 km¬≤ (ma'linpan atjunang 10.36 km¬≤, ma'linaule atjunang 2.57 km¬≤). ala caucau mapuljat 387 caucau, ala daceneqlan mapuljat 156 a daceneqlan, Saysiyat (32%) a maqcuwa caucau. paiwan a maqcuwa caucau. a i vecekadan tua miauli king a shitangu. pasazaya tua samangu (samňä vanňä hiongňä) a shitangu. pasakacedas a viri tua pinSa'o:ol; pasakacedas a navalj tua taian. kaljaqudjaljan a kadjunangan imaza a kemasi ta qiljasan a lima a patje qiljasan a siva. paljavak tua atjunang matja 7 qinaljan i Shitan. matja 1 qinaljan imaza, Sawi . cinalivatan kasicuayan a kaizuanan nia kacalisian imaza. qadjav a cavilj a 1900, djemaljun a ngaingai a papupaday imaza. tjaivililj, izuazua a ngaingai kata pairang uta imaza. izua milimilingan ta gadu a pasakaviri. pinapacunan a gadu azua a matu shize aya. shize aicu a anemanema qaca a qemuzimuzip se ciukuk. kinemenem a caucau imaza ta gadu kata puzaljuman tjaizua a kinazuganan nu vaik aicu a shize a kizaljum i puzaljuman. mavan shize a shitan aya imaza. kadjunangan a i vecekad aicu a shitan gu i tua miauli king. caucau izua 93.6% a caucau a tjatjuruvu imaza i shitan gu. papupaysu tataleman kasicuayan, pazangal a temalem ta paday kata ucia imaza. malialiaw a paday a tjaivililj, mavan putjavuvuk imaza. tatuluan izua tjelu a kedrikedri a gakku imaza i shitan gu. neka daigakku imaza. kakipucemelan iyubingkiuku (yuzeng) sasupuan na iyubingkiuku 354 a sasupuan na iyubingkiku se sawi' (shitan gu). remayurangan djalan na kasicuayan izua liaw a djalan na kasicuayan imaza i shitan. shitan a lizuk shitan a lizuk aicu a tjaizua a papatjezuan na sikamasantjelulj a palidring a djalan na taiwan kata sikamasan 124 a palidring a djalan na miaoli king. sipacacikeljan palidring a djalan sikamasantjelulj a palidring a djalan na taiwan: tjapazangal a palidring a djalan imaza. maqati kemasimaza a patje dahu gu kata sanwan gu. sikamasannemelj a palidring a djalan na taiwan: patje dahu gu kata lizuk a miaoli sikamasan 72 a palidirng a djalan na taiwan: nasinandjalananga aicu a tjadjaljav a kemasimaza i shitan gu a patje lizuk a miaoli. sikamasan 124 a palidring a djalan na miaoli king: kemasimaza a patje nanzhuang gu sikamasan 126 a palidirng a djalan na miaoli king: paka puzaljuman a mingde a patje lizuk a miaoli sikamasan 22 a palidring a djalan na miaolit: ÁćÖśĹ≠ťĄČśįłŤąąśĚĎŚĆóÁ™©ŚŹ£ÔĻĚŚŹį3Á∑ö113KÔĻě ÔĻĚŚŹį13Á∑öÔĻě sikamasan 26 a palidring a djalan na miaolit: 3Á∑ö116KÔĻě sikamasan 63 a palidring a djalan na miaolit: sikamasan 64 a palidring a djalan na miaolit: basu basu na miaoli: sikamasan 5822 a kemasi ta ŚćóŤéä a paka ŚÖęŚć¶Śäõ a patje šĽôŚĪĪťĚąśīěŚģģ basu na sincu: sikamasan 5657 a kemasi ta miaoli a paka a patje shitan imaza djamay tjavuvuk qaca a gang ucia
S.PHON: shitan shitan gu i ¶uwa i miau…≠i. a…≠a a ¶unaŇčn mapu éat **.** km* (ma Ē…≠inpan a ¶unaŇč **.** km*, ma Ē…≠inau…≠…ô a ¶unaŇč *.** km*). a…≠a ¶au ¶au mapu éat *** ¶au ¶au, a…≠a da ¶…ôn…ôq…≠an mapu éat *** a da ¶…ôn…ôq…≠an, sajsijat (**%) a maq ¶uwa ¶au ¶au. paiwan a maq ¶uwa ¶au ¶au. a i v…ô ¶…ôkadan tua miau…≠i kiŇč a shitaŇču. pasazaja tua samaŇču (sam* van* hiuŇč*) a shitaŇču. pasaka ¶…ôdas a viri tua pinsa Ēu:u…≠; pasaka ¶…ôdas a nava é tua taian. ka éaqu…Ča éan a ka…ČunaŇčan imaza a k…ômasi ta qi éasan a …≠ima a pa ¶…ô qi éasan a siva. pa éavak tua a ¶unaŇč ma ¶a * qina éan i shitan. ma ¶a * qina éan imaza, sawi . ¶ina…≠ivatan kasi ¶uajan a kaizuanan nia ka ¶a…≠isian imaza. qa…Čav a ¶avi é a ****, …Č…ôma éun a ŇčaiŇčai a papupadaj imaza. ¶aivi…≠i é, izuazua a ŇčaiŇčai kata pairaŇč uta imaza. izua mi…≠imi…≠iŇčan ta gadu a pasakaviri. pinapa ¶unan a gadu azua a matu shiz…ô aja. shiz…ô ai ¶u a an…ôman…ôma qa ¶a a q…ômuzimuzip s…ô ¶iukuk. kin…ôm…ôn…ôm a ¶au ¶au imaza ta gadu kata puza éuman ¶aizua a kinazuganan nu vaik ai ¶u a shiz…ô a kiza éum i puza éuman. mavan shiz…ô a shitan aja imaza. ka…ČunaŇčan a i v…ô ¶…ôkad ai ¶u a shitan gu i tua miau…≠i kiŇč. ¶au ¶au izua **.*% a ¶au ¶au a ¶a ¶uruvu imaza i shitan gu. papupajsu tata…≠…ôman kasi ¶uajan, pazaŇča…≠ a t…ôma…≠…ôm ta padaj kata u ¶ia imaza. ma…≠ia…≠iaw a padaj a ¶aivi…≠i é, mavan pu ¶avuvuk imaza. tatu…≠uan izua ¶…ô…≠u a k…ô…Ėik…ô…Ėi a gakku imaza i shitan gu. n…ôka daigakku imaza. kakipu ¶…ôm…ô…≠an ijubiŇčkiuku (juz…ôŇč) sasupuan na ijubiŇčkiuku *** a sasupuan na ijubiŇčkiku s…ô sawi Ē (shitan gu). r…ômajuraŇčan …Ča…≠an na kasi ¶uajan izua …≠iaw a …Ča…≠an na kasi ¶uajan imaza i shitan. shitan a …≠izuk shitan a …≠izuk ai ¶u a ¶aizua a papa ¶…ôzuan na sikamasan ¶…ô…≠u é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan kata sikamasan *** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na miau…≠i kiŇč. sipa ¶a ¶ik…ô éan pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an sikamasan ¶…ô…≠u é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan: ¶apazaŇča…≠ a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an imaza. maqati k…ômasimaza a pa ¶…ô dahu gu kata sanwan gu. sikamasann…ôm…ô é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan: pa ¶…ô dahu gu kata …≠izuk a miau…≠i sikamasan ** a pa…≠idirŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan: nasinan…Ča…≠anaŇča ai ¶u a ¶a…Ča éav a k…ômasimaza i shitan gu a pa ¶…ô …≠izuk a miau…≠i. sikamasan *** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na miau…≠i kiŇč: k…ômasimaza a pa ¶…ô nanzhuaŇč gu sikamasan *** a pa…≠idirŇč a …Ča…≠an na miau…≠i kiŇč: paka puza éuman a miŇčd…ô a pa ¶…ô …≠izuk a miau…≠i sikamasan ** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na miau…≠it: ****************k* ****** sikamasan ** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na miau…≠it: *****k* sikamasan ** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na miau…≠it: sikamasan ** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na miau…≠it: basu basu na miau…≠i: sikamasan **** a k…ômasi ta ** a paka *** a pa ¶…ô ***** basu na sin ¶u: sikamasan **** a k…ômasi ta miau…≠i a paka a pa ¶…ô shitan imaza …Čamaj ¶avuvuk qa ¶a a gaŇč u ¶ia
S.FORM: Shitan Shitan gu icuwa i Miaoli. ala atjunangn mapuljat 79.39 km¬≤ (ma'linpan atjunang 10.36 km¬≤, ma'linaule atjunang 2.57 km¬≤). ala caucau mapuljat 387 caucau, ala daceneqlan mapuljat 156 a daceneqlan, Saysiyat (32%) a maqcuwa caucau. paiwan a maqcuwa caucau. a i vecekadan tua miauli king a shitangu. pasazaya tua samangu (samňä vanňä hiongňä) a shitangu. pasakacedas a viri tua pinSa'o:ol; pasakacedas a navalj tua taian. kaljaqudjaljan a kadjunangan imaza a kemasi ta qiljasan a lima a patje qiljasan a siva. paljavak tua atjunang matja 7 qinaljan i Shitan. matja 1 qinaljan imaza, Sawi . cinalivatan kasicuayan a kaizuanan nia kacalisian imaza. qadjav a cavilj a 1900, djemaljun a ngaingai a papupaday imaza. tjaivililj, izuazua a ngaingai kata pairang uta imaza. izua milimilingan ta gadu a pasakaviri. pinapacunan a gadu azua a matu shize aya. shize aicu a anemanema qaca a qemuzimuzip se ciukuk. kinemenem a caucau imaza ta gadu kata puzaljuman tjaizua a kinazuganan nu vaik aicu a shize a kizaljum i puzaljuman. mavan shize a shitan aya imaza. kadjunangan a i vecekad aicu a shitan gu i tua miauli king. caucau izua 93.6% a caucau a tjatjuruvu imaza i shitan gu. papupaysu tataleman kasicuayan, pazangal a temalem ta paday kata ucia imaza. malialiaw a paday a tjaivililj, mavan putjavuvuk imaza. tatuluan izua tjelu a kedrikedri a gakku imaza i shitan gu. neka daigakku imaza. kakipucemelan iyubingkiuku (yuzeng) sasupuan na iyubingkiuku 354 a sasupuan na iyubingkiku se sawi' (shitan gu). remayurangan djalan na kasicuayan izua liaw a djalan na kasicuayan imaza i shitan. shitan a lizuk shitan a lizuk aicu a tjaizua a papatjezuan na sikamasantjelulj a palidring a djalan na taiwan kata sikamasan 124 a palidring a djalan na miaoli king. sipacacikeljan palidring a djalan sikamasantjelulj a palidring a djalan na taiwan: tjapazangal a palidring a djalan imaza. maqati kemasimaza a patje dahu gu kata sanwan gu. sikamasannemelj a palidring a djalan na taiwan: patje dahu gu kata lizuk a miaoli sikamasan 72 a palidirng a djalan na taiwan: nasinandjalananga aicu a tjadjaljav a kemasimaza i shitan gu a patje lizuk a miaoli. sikamasan 124 a palidring a djalan na miaoli king: kemasimaza a patje nanzhuang gu sikamasan 126 a palidirng a djalan na miaoli king: paka puzaljuman a mingde a patje lizuk a miaoli sikamasan 22 a palidring a djalan na miaolit: **.*% a ¶au ¶au a ¶a ¶uruvu imaza i shitan gu. papupajsu tata…≠…ôman kasi ¶uajan, pazaŇča…≠ a t…ôma…≠…ôm ta padaj kata u ¶ia imaza. ma…≠ia…≠iaw a padaj a ¶aivi…≠i é, mavan pu ¶avuvuk imaza. tatu…≠uan izua ¶…ô…≠u a k…ô…Ėik…ô…Ėi a gakku imaza i shitan gu. n…ôka daigakku imaza. kakipu ¶…ôm…ô…≠an ijubiŇčkiuku (juz…ôŇč) sasupuan na ijubiŇčkiuku *** a sasupuan na ijubiŇčkiku s…ô sawi Ē (shitan gu). r…ômajuraŇčan …Ča…≠an na kasi ¶uajan izua …≠iaw a …Ča…≠an na kasi ¶uajan imaza i shitan. shitan a …≠izuk shitan a …≠izuk ai ¶u a ¶aizua a papa ¶…ôzuan na sikamasan ¶…ô…≠u é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan kata sikamasan *** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na miau…≠i kiŇč. sipa ¶a ¶ik…ô éan pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an sikamasan ¶…ô…≠u é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan: ¶apazaŇča…≠ a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an imaza. maqati k…ômasimaza a pa ¶…ô dahu gu kata sanwan gu. sikamasann…ôm…ô é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan: pa ¶…ô dahu gu kata …≠izuk a miau…≠i sikamasan ** a pa…≠idirŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan: nasinan…Ča…≠anaŇča ai ¶u a ¶a…Ča éav a k…ômasimaza i shitan gu a pa ¶…ô …≠izuk a miau…≠i. sikamasan *** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na miau…≠i kiŇč: k…ômasimaza a pa ¶…ô nanzhuaŇč gu sikamasan *** a pa…≠idirŇč a …Ča…≠an na miau…≠i kiŇč: paka puza éuman a miŇčd…ô a pa ¶…ô …≠izuk a miau…≠i sikamasan ** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na miau…≠it: ****************k* ****** sikamasan ** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na miau…≠it: *****k* sikamasan ** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na miau…≠it: sikamasan ** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na miau…≠it: basu basu na miau…≠i: sikamasan **** a k…ômasi ta ** a paka *** a pa ¶…ô *****
